response.justification: While Bogdan has over 15 years of solid software engineering experience and an entrepreneurial background as a founder, his profile does not align with the Director-level seniority and deep AI/ML strategic expertise required for this role. His AI experience appears limited to very recent infrastructure work, lacking the recognized AI industry leadership, advanced ML platform building, and strategic customer advisory experience necessary for a Principal Engineer in AI Strategy.
strengths: Exceeds the 15-year minimum experience requirement with a diverse background across software, hardware, and infrastructure engineering.
Demonstrates strong entrepreneurial initiative as the founder of an open-source Geo-Data platform (GISCollective).
Proven track record of technical community engagement and inspiring others through workshops, conference talks, and open-source contributions.
concerns: Lacks the Director-level strategic leadership experience expected for a Principal Engineer role, having primarily held Senior and Staff Developer titles.
AI/ML experience is limited to recent tooling work, missing the preferred deep, recognized industry expertise in artificial intelligence.
No demonstrated track record of advising strategic enterprise customers or partners on cutting-edge cloud and AI technology adoption.
